Localization.Description: Suspicious activity with a certificate revocation list (CRL). Access to a CRL allows attackers to force the CA server to authenticate on a remote server or remotely execute code on the CA server. For this rule to work, you must complete the "CRL_Publication_Time" tabular list.

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.account.name} sent a suspicious request to publish a certificate revocation list to CA server {event_src.host}
For remote code execution, a request was created to place suspicious file "{object.name}" on CA server {event_src.host}
For remote code execution on host {alert.regex_match}, a request was created to place suspicious file "{object.name}" on this host via CA {event_src.host}
